meta.title: ARDICTECH — The Digital Mycelium of Industry
meta.description: ARDICTECH: AI-powered industrial intelligence connecting machines, data, and decisions. IoT, AI, MES and mobility solutions for the sentient factory.

hero.headline: The Digital Mycelium of Industry
hero.subheadline: The invisible intelligence connecting your machines, data, and decisions. We bridge the gap between raw industrial data and digital consciousness — turning every sensor into a voice.

slide2.headline: The AI Heart of Your Factory
slide2.subheadline: At the center of every high-performing plant is a pulse of data. We provide the AI-native core that pumps real-time insights across your floor.
slide2.feature1: Turn static operations into intelligent systems.
slide2.feature2: Enable features like Chat With Your Factory to make machinery a responsive, living partner in your success.

slide3.headline: The Transformation Bridge
slide3.subheadline: From Legacy Assets to AI-Native Power.

products.title: Products & Services
products.subtitle: Five interconnected nodes in the ARDICTECH network — each solving a distinct industrial challenge.

items.title: Modiverse
items.description: Ultimate Mobility Device Management. Control and manage your enterprise mobile fleet with SaaS-grade simplicity — Essential or Premium.

items.title: ArMES
items.description: 11-module Manufacturing Execution System for total operational control. Contextualize, orchestrate, and integrate your entire factory floor.

items.title: Digital Transformation
items.description: The Operational Ensō — a circle of continuous becoming. From dark data to sentient factory, we guide your full digitalization journey.

items.title: CWF: Data Intelligence
items.description: Chat With Your Factory. Natural language insights from your production floor. If your factory could speak — what would it say?

items.title: Center of Excellence
items.description: Software development outsourcing and managed services. Scalable platform integration at the highest data volumes, cost-effectively.

technologies.title: Technologies & Platforms
technologies.subtitle: The network nodes powering the ARDICTECH ecosystem.

items.title: IoT-Ignite
items.description: PaaS IoT platform with smart edge computing, protocol-agnostic connectivity, and secure overlay. The data collection backbone.

items.title: ArAI
items.description: Advanced reasoning and semantics. Predictive quality, energy optimization, and the data moat that makes your intelligence proprietary.

items.title: ArCloud
items.description: Geographically distributed, managed cloud infrastructure. Large-scale platform hosting at enterprise grade — cost effectively.

items.title: Blockchain
items.description: Immutable audit trails and trustless data integrity for industrial operations. Transparency you can prove.

items.title: ArICAAAS
items.description: Identity, Context, Authentication, Authorization and Audit as a Service. Enterprise security made composable.

items.title: PilarOS / AFEX
items.description: Domestic Turkish mobile OS built on Android AOSP + AFEX security framework. Full device sovereignty — your devices, your data.

steps.title: Collect
steps.description: Edge computing collects data from every sensor, machine, and line — protocol-agnostic, at scale.

steps.title: Contextualize
steps.description: 11 interconnected modules orchestrate, contextualize, and integrate your entire operational reality.

steps.title: Converse
steps.description: Natural language insights delivered in seconds, not hours. Your factory finally has a voice.

sentientFactory.title: The Sentient Factory.
sentientFactory.subtitle: A Circle of Continuous Becoming.
sentientFactory.body: Your factory is more than just a collection of machines. We bridge the gap between raw industrial data and digital consciousness — turning every sensor into a voice, every anomaly into an insight, and every insight into action.

cta.headline: Ready to Join the Network?
cta.subtitle: Let's map your factory floor and identify the first node of intelligence to activate.

contact.title: Connect With Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your factory and we'll show you exactly where the mycelium takes root.

fields.message: Tell us about your industrial challenge
